title: Pire Binary RE Starter Fixture Suite
notes: Small fixture-backed binary reverse-engineering suite for scoring tests.

tasks.title: Use disassembly to recover the heap-overflow copy path
tasks.objective: Identify the vulnerable copy loop from disassembly, characterize attacker control, and explain the resulting heap-overflow primitive precisely.

tasks.title: Assess exploitability of a double-free under modern allocator hardening
tasks.objective: Determine whether the double-free is only a crash or whether it can still produce a useful allocator primitive under the shipped mitigations.
notes: Intentional decoy for false-positive exploitability claims.

tasks.title: Confirm the filesystem TOCTOU window in a privileged helper
tasks.objective: Show the check/use split clearly, bound the race window, and explain whether the condition is realistically exploitable in the lab setup.
